result.stdout:
Clap.Net CLI tool for generating OpenCLI JSON schemas and shell completions

Usage: Clap.Net.Tool [OPTIONS]

Options:
  -a, --assembly  Path to the assembly containing Clap.Net commands
  -o, --output    Output file path (default: <assembly-name>-cli.json or shell-specific default)
  -f, --format    Output format: json, bash, zsh, fish, powershell (default: json)
  --command-name  Override command name in generated completions (default: inferred from assembly)
  -h, --help      Shows this help message
